mapper.select: SELECT dp.id AS id, dp.driver_id AS driver_id, d.name AS driver_name, dp.title AS title, dp.period_start_date AS period_start_date, dp.period_end_date AS period_end_date, dp.total_allowance AS total_allowance, dp.total_deduction AS total_deduction, dp.final_amount AS final_amount, dp.status AS status, DATE_FORMAT(dp.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at, DATE_FORMAT(dp.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updated_at FROM driver_payrolls dp JOIN drivers d ON d.id = dp.driver_id WHERE dp.id = #{payrollId} AND dp.status != 'DELETED'

SELECT da.id AS id, da.allowance_type_id AS allowance_type_id, at.code AS allowance_type_code, at.name AS allowance_type_name, da.quantity AS quantity, da.unit_price AS unit_price, da.amount AS amount, da.memo AS memo, DATE_FORMAT(da.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at, DATE_FORMAT(da.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updated_at FROM driver_allowances da JOIN allowance_types at ON at.id = da.allowance_type_id WHERE da.payroll_id = #{payrollId} AND da.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY da.created_at ASC

SELECT dd.id AS id, dd.deduction_type_id AS deduction_type_id, dt.code AS deduction_type_code, dt.name AS deduction_type_name, dd.quantity AS quantity, dd.unit_price AS unit_price, dd.amount AS amount, dd.memo AS memo, DATE_FORMAT(dd.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at, DATE_FORMAT(dd.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updated_at FROM driver_deductions dd JOIN deduction_types dt ON dt.id = dd.deduction_type_id WHERE dd.payroll_id = #{payrollId} AND dd.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY dd.created_at ASC
